nodes.name: Blue-backed conebill
nodes.summary: Blue-backed conebill（Conirostrum sitticolor）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Blue-backed conebill。

nodes.name: Rufous-browed conebill

nodes.name: Conirostrum
